response.justification: Nearly two decades of fullstack experience with strong alignment to the core stack — TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, and Docker/Kubernetes — plus current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work, which is an explicitly required and rare skill. Deep testing culture (TDD, test-library author, testing workshops) matches the quality expectations. Some named technologies (Nest.js, Kotlin, Python, Vitest) are not explicitly evidenced, but the breadth and craftsmanship record suggest fast ramp-up.
strengths: Extensive fullstack TypeScript/Node.js/React experience at product companies
Current AI-agent and MCP development experience, directly matching a required skill
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, taught courses)
concerns: Kotlin and Python absent from skills; Java exposure appears dated
Significant time invested in niche DLang ecosystem rather than the role's primary stack
